items.statcast_observation: Bobby Witt Jr. produced the hardest tracked Royals contact: 111.6 mph at a 10.0 degree launch angle.
items.summary: The Royals lost to the St. Louis Cardinals, KC 4, STL 5. Michael Wacha led the night, working 6.0 innings with 3 earned runs, 5 strikeouts and 1 walk. Bobby Witt Jr. supplied the loudest Royals contact at 111.6 mph.
items.title: Royals at Cardinals Recap
